# opnsense_monit_test (Resource)

Manages a monit test on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action on match (alert, restart, stop, exec, ...).
- `condition` (String) Monit condition expression.
- `name` (String) Test name.
- `type` (String) Test type (e.g. SystemResource, ProcessMemory).

### Optional

- `path` (String) Path/program for exec action.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
